title: ProRAG: Process-Supervised Reinforcement Learning for Retrieval-Augmented Generation

defines.name: ProRAG
defines.definition: A process-supervised reinforcement learning framework for optimizing multi-hop RAG by combining learned step-level process rewards with global outcome signals.

problem: Outcome-based RL for RAG suffers from reward sparsity and poor credit assignment, causing process hallucinations and inefficient learning on long-horizon reasoning tasks.
